sentences.arabic: أَدَّى مُصْطَفَى صَلَاةَ الْعَصْرِ فِي وَقْتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Mustafa je klanjao ikindija-namaz u njegovo vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Mustafa performed the Asr prayer on time.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ فِي مَكَانِ عَمَلِهِ لَكِنَّهُ تَوَقَّفَ عَنِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Bio je na poslu ali je prestao raditi.
sentences.translationEn: He was at his workplace but he stopped working.

sentences.translation: Uzeo je abdest i klanjao na mirnom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: He performed ablution and prayed in a quiet place.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ إِلَى عَمَلِهِ وَهُوَ مُرْتَاحُ الْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se na posao spokojnog uma.
sentences.translationEn: He returned to his work with a peaceful mind.
